evidence.page_title: Olympics leave mixed legacy in Paris suburb of Saint-Denis - DW.com
evidence.title: Olympics leave mixed legacy in Paris suburb of Saint-Denis
evidence.description: In the Paris suburb of Saint-Denis, stylish apartments are being built in underprivileged areas. Longtime residents of the district feel left behind.
evidence.text: SocietyFranceOlympics leave mixed legacy in Paris suburb of Saint-DenisTo view this video please enable JavaScript, and consider upgrading to a web browser that supports HTML5 videoSocietyFranceLisa Louis in Saint-Denis, France06/19/2025June 19, 2025In the Paris suburb of Saint-Denis, stylish apartments are being built in underprivileged areas. evidence.page_title: View over a slum near a train station close to Paris, France ... - Alamy
evidence.title: View over a slum near a train station close to Paris, France, in November 1970. The quarter, which was inhabited mostly by immigrants, was abandoned. Photo: Wilfried Glienke | usage worldwide Stock Photo - Alamy
